core.changelog:
- 🎁 Option Property — generic dropdown with per-instance configurable options
- 🔧 Fixed owner null crash in window UI components
- 🔧 Fixed option_property refresh conflict with call_deferred()
- 🔧 Fixed focus loss in string-type property settings

premium.changelog:
- 🎁 Expanded Stats System (8 → 21 stats)
- 🎁 Magic Damage, Armor/Magic Penetration, Luck Drop Rate
- 🎁 Equipment Set Bonus System
- 🎁 Option Property, Category Filters
- 🔧 Multiple bug fixes
